Interface IEnumElementRecord

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that enumerate through Element records.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("B82A0B86-FCE4-4B05-9B86-10DC4DE1321E")]
public interface IEnumElementRecord
